company_panel_info_description:
**Company Panel**

The Company Panel is used to manage your company team.

This section is divided into **two parts:**

**User Authorization**
Here you can **add new people** to your company and manage their access.

**Delete User**
This section allows you to **remove users** from your company when they are no longer part of the team.

That's it — a simple and straightforward way to manage your company members.
finance_info_description:
**Finance**

The Finance section is divided into **three main categories.**

**1. Work Pricing**
Work Pricing is generated automatically during the **project creation process.**
Every time you create a new project, a complete work pricing appears here.

After selecting an existing project, you'll see a full summary including:

• Tasks
• Materials
• Additional costs

You can freely **edit and adjust prices**, for example:

• If material prices have changed
• If you want to offer a custom price for a specific client
• If a price was not saved in the materials list (which is not required)

This makes creating estimates fast and flexible.

One of the biggest advantages is that you can **build a project together with the client** and instantly generate a full price estimate — as long as your prices are set, the calculation is immediate. No more spending hours calculating costs later.

The entire pricing can be **exported to PDF** and sent directly to the client.

**2. Invoice Maker**
The **Invoice Maker** allows you to generate invoices based on a **selected time period.**

For example, if you invoice clients weekly:

• Choose the project
• Select the desired date range
• Generate a detailed invoice

The invoice includes:

• Work completed
• Materials delivered
• All recorded activity for that period

Everything is generated automatically based on how you update and manage your projects, so as long as the data is entered correctly, all information is already there.

Invoices can also be exported to PDF and sent to clients.

**3. Financial Overview**
The Financial Overview gives you a complete picture of your company's finances.

Here you can track:

• Total labor costs based on time spent on tasks
• All material costs across all projects

You can filter data by:

• Weekly
• Monthly
• Yearly date ranges

This section helps you monitor expenses, performance, and overall financial health of your business.
click_anywhere_close: Click anywhere or press Esc to close
profile_info_description:
**Profile**

The Profile section contains your personal settings and a complete overview of your activity.

Here you can:

• Edit your **first name** and **last name**
• Log out
• Delete your company
• View all your personal records, including **worked hours**

**Task Performance Overview**
This area shows a detailed breakdown of your work and is divided into six categories.
Below is a brief explanation of the most important ones:

**Check Weekly Hours**
Here you can review your working hours by:

• Day
• Week
• Month
• Custom date range

This gives you full control over your time tracking.

**Task Performance**
This section contains all your **task-related entries.**

You can see:

• All tasks you've worked on
• The **average time** you spend on specific types of work
• Your performance metrics, such as:
  • Slabs laid per hour
  • Square meters of slabs per hour
  • Paving blocks per hour
  • And similar task-based productivity data

These averages are calculated based on **all your recorded entries.**

**All Personal Records**
This section includes every entry you've added to any project, such as:

• Task performance
• Additional tasks
• Materials
• Additional materials
• Day notes

Everything related to your work history is stored and visible here in one place.
rls_matrix_subtitle: Row Level Security — permissions after migration
rls_delete_tooltip_user: Own entries from the same day only
rls_notes_crud: S = SELECT, I = INSERT, U = UPDATE, D = DELETE
rls_notes_conditional_delete: DELETE — User: own entries from the same day only (Europe/Warsaw); Team Leader / PM: full DELETE
rls_notes_readonly: Tables marked READONLY have SELECT and INSERT only for all roles
rls_notes_invoices: invoices — access for Project Manager only (SELECT, INSERT, UPDATE)
